name: Lamb Fillet with Morels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place the lamb fillet on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Arrange the dried morels and minced chicken breast over the lamb.
4. Drizzle with butter, then season generously with salt and pepper.
5. Wrap the pork net around the lamb securely.
6. Cover the parcel tightly with foil and place in the oven.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches your desired level of doneness.
8. Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
9. Discard the pork net and serve.
